mapper.sql: SELECT t.tag_id, t.owner_user_id, t.tag_name, t.tag_key, t.create_by, t.create_time, t.update_time, t.remark, COUNT(DISTINCT d.document_id) AS document_count, IFNULL(m.status, '0') AS status FROM sys_tag t LEFT JOIN sys_document_tag dt ON t.tag_id = dt.tag_id LEFT JOIN sys_document d ON dt.document_id = d.document_id AND d.del_flag = '0' LEFT JOIN sys_menu m ON m.path = concat('tag-', t.tag_id) AND m.remark = 'AUTO_TAG_MENU'
mapper.select:
t.del_flag = '0' and t.tag_name like concat('%', #{tagName}, '%') and t.owner_user_id = #{ownerUserId}
GROUP BY t.tag_id, t.owner_user_id, t.tag_name, t.tag_key, t.create_by, t.create_time, t.update_time, t.remark, m.status ORDER BY t.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_tag( owner_user_id, tag_name, create_by, remark, create_time ) VALUES ( #{ownerUserId}, #{tagName}, #{createBy}, #{remark}, sysdate() )
mapper.update:
UPDATE sys_tag
tag_name = #{tagName}, remark = #{remark}, update_time = sysdate()
WHERE tag_id = #{tagId} AND del_flag = '0'
mapper.select: SELECT d.document_name FROM sys_document d INNER JOIN sys_document_tag dt ON d.document_id = dt.document_id WHERE dt.tag_id = #{tagId} AND d.del_flag = '0' ORDER BY d.create_time DESC
SELECT t.tag_name FROM sys_tag t LEFT JOIN sys_document_tag dt ON t.tag_id = dt.tag_id WHERE t.owner_user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY t.tag_id, t.tag_name ORDER BY COUNT(dt.document_id) DESC

SELECT t.tag_id, t.owner_user_id, t.tag_name, t.tag_key FROM sys_tag t INNER JOIN sys_document_tag dt ON t.tag_id = dt.tag_id INNER JOIN sys_document d ON dt.document_id = d.document_id WHERE t.del_flag = '0' AND d.del_flag = '0' GROUP BY t.tag_id, t.owner_user_id, t.tag_name, t.tag_key ORDER BY t.tag_id

SELECT DISTINCT tag_id FROM sys_document_tag WHERE document_id in
#{documentId}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM sys_document_tag WHERE document_id in
#{documentId}
mapper.select: select count(1) from sys_document_tag where document_id = #{documentId} and tag_id = #{tagId}
mapper.insert: insert into sys_document_tag(document_id, tag_id, create_time) values(#{documentId}, #{tagId}, #{createTime})
